lessons.title: Sage Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn SGE's unique identity: Kardia passive healing, emergency response, and target selection for optimal Kardia use.
keyPoints: Kardia: passive heal on target when you deal damage - keep it on tank
SGE heals by dealing damage (Kardia) - DPS = healing
Emergency healing uses Addersgall abilities (Druochole, Taurochole)
Kardia target should rarely change once set on the main tank
tips: Apply Kardia before combat starts - it's your primary tank healing
Your GCD attacks heal the Kardia target automatically

lessons.title: Addersgall Economy
lessons.description: Master Addersgall resource: generation timing, spending on heals vs damage, and the four Addersgall abilities.
keyPoints: Addersgall: regenerates 1 stack every 20s (max 3)
Druochole: single-target heal (1 stack) - basic tank heal
Taurochole: single-target heal + 10% mitigation (1 stack)
Kerachole: party mitigation + HoT (1 stack) - 30s CD
Ixochole: party heal (1 stack) - 30s CD
tips: Don't overcap Addersgall - spend stacks before hitting 3
Kerachole is extremely efficient - use it on cooldown for mitigation

lessons.title: Kardia Optimization
lessons.description: Enhance Kardia healing with Soteria's boost and Philosophia's party-wide Kardia effect.
keyPoints: Soteria: 50% Kardia healing boost for 15s (60s CD)
Use Soteria during high tank damage phases
Philosophia: party-wide Kardia effect for 20s (3min CD)
Philosophia lets your damage heal the entire party
tips: Soteria is free extra healing - use it liberally
Philosophia during AoE damage phases is extremely powerful

lessons.title: Eukrasia System
lessons.description: Understand Eukrasia: converting Diagnosis to shields, Prognosis to party shields, and Dosis to DoT.
keyPoints: Eukrasia modifies your next Diagnosis, Prognosis, or Dosis
E.Diagnosis: single-target shield - apply before tankbusters
E.Prognosis: party shield - apply before raidwides
E.Dosis: your DoT - maintain 100% uptime on boss
tips: Eukrasia is instant - weave it before your shield spell
E.Dosis refresh at 3s or less to avoid clipping

lessons.title: oGCD Healing Toolkit
lessons.description: Master SGE's powerful oGCD heals: Physis, Holos, Pneuma, and Krasis for enhanced healing.
keyPoints: Physis II: party HoT + healing received boost (60s CD)
Holos: party shield + heal (2min CD) - strong raidwide mitigation
Pneuma: line AoE damage + party heal (2min CD)
Krasis: 20% healing boost on target for 10s (60s CD)
tips: Physis is free - use it on cooldown for the healing boost
Pneuma deals damage AND heals - never let it sit unused

lessons.title: Defensive Cooldowns
lessons.description: Master SGE's defensive abilities: Haima, Panhaima, Pepsis shield conversion, Zoe healing boost, and Rhizomata resource generation.
keyPoints: Haima: stacking shields on single target (2min CD) - great for tankbusters
Panhaima: stacking shields on party (2min CD) - great for multi-hit raidwides
Pepsis: converts your shields into healing instantly
Zoe: 50% boost to next GCD heal (90s CD)
Rhizomata: grants 1 Addersgall stack (90s CD) - free resources
tips: Haima's shields refresh when broken - put it on tank before autos
Pepsis is useful when shields would be wasted

lessons.title: DPS & Coordination
lessons.description: Final lesson: DPS optimization, DoT maintenance, offensive abilities (Phlegma, Toxikon, Psyche), raise coordination, and co-healer synergy.
keyPoints: Dosis is your filler - cast it when not healing (Kardia heals tank)
Phlegma: 2 charges, strong instant damage - use in burst windows
Toxikon: instant damage, costs Addersting (from broken E.Diagnosis shields)
Psyche: strong oGCD damage (1min CD) - use on cooldown
Coordinate raises with co-healer, shields with regen healer
tips: SGE's high DPS comes from Kardia - casting Dosis heals AND damages
Save Phlegma charges for burst windows when possible
